name: 𝐌𝐚𝐆𝐢𝐛𝐚𝐳_𝐓𝐎𝐌
description: 𝐌𝐚𝐆𝐢𝐛𝐚𝐳_𝐓𝐎𝐌; your powerful WhatsApp multi-session bot!

MASTER_PASSWORD.description: Password for the web dashboard. Required to pair sessions and access bot settings.

GITHUB_USERNAME.description: Your GitHub username. You must have forked the CypherX-Ultra repository before using this bot.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Automatically set by the Heroku Postgres add-on — do not change.
